# Configuration Directory

This directory stores Larj configuration files.

## Files

- `settings.json`: Main application settings (hotkey, window, search, etc.)
- `apps.json`: Application shortcuts data
- `plugins.json`: Plugin configurations

## Auto-generated

These files are automatically created with default values on first run.

## Manual Editing

You can manually edit these JSON files to customize settings.
The application will reload configurations automatically.

## Backup

It's recommended to backup these files before major updates.
